verses.text: A cimawhte' thutang kimlai hei khiatsakin, keima mite sungah a zawngte' thuman sutkhia-in, meigong numeite' neihsa amau-a' ding a suahtheihna ding leh pa neilote' neihsa amau' nek dingin a bawl theihna dingun a manlo thukhensatna pia a, nenniamna thu a gelhte in gimna ngah ta uh hen
Gimpiak ni hun, gamlapi panin huihpi hong nun' ciangin note in bangcih ding na hi uh hiam? Huhna ngenin kua kiangah tai ding a, na neihsa uh koi lai-ah koih ding na hi uh hiam
Thongkiate' lakah tonbucipin om ding leh a kithat mite lakah sih ding bek a om hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna damzo nailo a, ama khut kizanlai hi.
Assiria-te pen ka hehna mite gimpiakna dingin molhtum leh ciangkhutin ka zat ahi hi
Keima thu a ngaihsunlo minam leh kei a hong hehsak mite' neihsa sutin laksakin, amaute pen konglak buannawng bangin a tuancil dingin amaute sawlin thu ka pia hi
Ahih hangin a kumpipa in tua bang bek sawmlo a, a lungsim in zong tua bang bek ngaihsun lo hi. Ama lungsim sungah minam tampi suksiat nopna thu om hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ka galkapmangte, kumpi vive hikhin hilo ahi hiam
Kalno khuapi pen Karkhemish khuapi tawh kibang hilo ahi hiam? Hamath khuapi pen Arpad khuapi tawh kibang hilo ahi hiam? Samaria khuapi pen Damaskas khuapi tawh kibang hilo ahi hiam
Jerusalem leh Samaria milimte sangin milim lianzaw a nei milim kumpi gamte ka khut in ban khin ahih ciangin
Samaria leh a milimte tungah ka bawl bangin Jerusalem leh a milimte tungah bawllo ding ka hi hiam?” ci hi
Topa in Zion Mual leh Jerusalem khua-ah ama nasep dingteng a zawh khit ciangin Assiria kumpipa kiphasakin a kisialhna leh a kiphatsakna hangin gim a pia ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keimah in thu theihtelna nei ka hih manin keima thahatna leh keima pilna tawh ka hih khin hi. Mihingte' gamgite lakhia-in amau' sumte ka sut khin a, keimah in bawngtal bangin a gammite ka sugawp hi
Vasa bumek bangin mihingte' hauhna ka la ziau hi. A kinusia vasa tuite mite in a lak bangin leitung khempeuh ka la khin hi. A kha a zap, a kam a ka, a ham khat beek omlo hi,” a ci hi

Amah a liktopa pen molhtumin a zang ding bangkeek, sing a hilo mipa pen ciangkhut bangin a likto ding bang keekin, phukna dingin amah a zangpa tungah, hei, kihisak thei ding ahi hiam? Singat tem zong amah a zangpa tungah kiliansak thei ding ahi hiam
Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Vanglian Topa in ama mi thaute lakah natna lianpi tungsak ding a, tua natna pen amaute sungah mei bangin kuang niloh ding hi
Israel-te' khuavak pen mei suakin, Israel-te' Siangtho Pa pen meikuang suak ding hi. Ni khat sungin ama lingkungte leh lingte kangin beitum ding hi
Gah tampi a piangsak ama leitang leh ama gamlak a minthan'na pen nuntakna leh pumpi dong takin Topa in susia ding a, mi cina khat a si tawh kibang ding hi
A omlai gamlak singkungte tawm mahmah ta a, naupang khat nangawn in khat khatin sim khin thei hi.
Tua ni-a kipan Israel a omlaite, Jakob innkuan a suakta laite in amau a sugawppa suang nawnloin, Topa ahi, Israel Siangtho Pa pen thuman tawh suan'in nei ding uh hi
Jakob innkuan a omlaite a vanglian Pasian kiangah ciahkik ding hi
Na mi Israel-te, tuipi sehnel zah a phak hangin amaute tawmkhat bek hong ciahkik ding hi. Amaute' thuak dingin a kilawm bangin thu a kikhen ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, Vanglian Topa in a thukhennasa bangin leitung khempeuhah beisiangna a bawl ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Vanglian Topa in thu gen a, “Zion-ah a teng ka mihingte aw, Egypt mite' hih bangin amaute in molhtum tawh hong satin a ciangkhut uh hong lik ciangin Assiria mite kihta kei un
Bang hang hiam cih leh a sawtloin note tungah ka thangpaihna bei ding a, ka hehna amaute' tung tu-in, amaute sia ding uh hi
Vanglian Topa in Oreb suangpi-ah Midian mite a sukgawp bangin, amah in amaute tungah gimpiakna zang ding a, Egypt mite a thuaksak bangin Assiria mite thuaksak ding hi
Tua ni ciangin na liangko panun ama vangikpi kinkhia ding a, ama hakkol pen na ngawng panun bei ding hi,” a ci hi.
Rimmon gam pan galte hong kipanin Aiath khua hong tung uh a, Migron khua kantanin hong pai uh a, Mikmash khua-ah a van uh hong seng uh hi
Amaute in mualciang kantanin Geba khua-ah zan khat giak uh hi. Rama khuamite lau-in ling uh a, Saul' ten'na Gibeah khuamite a tai uh hi
Gallim khuamite aw, nakpi takin kiko un! Laisah khuamite aw ngai un! Anathoth khuamite aw, amah dawng un
Madmenah khuamite taikhia a, Gebim khua-a a teng mite a suakta dingin a tai uh hi
Tuni mahmahin Nob khua-ah galte tungin khawl uh a, Zion Mual ahi Jerusalem khuapi a khuttum uh sin'san uh hi
En un, Topa, Vanglian Topa in a kihtakhuai vangliatna tawh singhiangte heuh ding hi. A kung sangte kiphuk ding a, a kisangsakte a niamin kikoih ding hi
Amah in tulak singte hei tawh phuk ding a, Lebanon mual a singkung liante tawh pukkhawm ding hi.
